Rover must have soil analysis for waypoint2, rock analysis for waypoint3, and have_image for objective1 high_res.

We need to ensure store handling: sample actions require empty store, produce full store. After sample, store becomes full. However we have only one store, so after first sample, store full, cannot sample again unless we drop to empty. Drop action empties store (makes empty). So we need to drop after first sample before second sample.

Goal includes both soil and rock data, so need both samples. So we need to sample soil at waypoint2, then drop, then sample rock at waypoint3 (or vice versa). Also need to take image of objective1 (any waypoint where visible_from objective1). All waypoints have visibility to objective1 (given). So we can take image at any waypoint where we are present and camera calibrated.

Calibration requires being at waypoint w, visible_from objective1 w, which holds for all waypoints. Also need calibration_target camera0 objective1 (given). So we can calibrate at any waypoint.

Take_image consumes calibration (calibrated predicate removed). So need to calibrate before each image if multiple images, but only one image needed.
